rationale: Codebase-pin lens: I ran plan §Bead 1's ENTIRE Verification checklist verbatim in the bead worktree (HEAD pinned at 17a2ed28, clean tree). All 7 items pass. V1-V3: the three named tests each pass their anchored '--- PASS' grep (exit 0). V4: whole internal/panel package green on a forced fresh run (go test -count=1 -v => ok 0.312s, zero FAIL lines) — not a stale cache; the three Bead-1 tests appear as top-level PASS and TestCreate_BRIEFMarkerEdgeCases exercises all four step-2 corner cases (legacy no-marker body preserved, marker-only-open rejected, duplicated-markers rejected, CRLF preserved). V5: config-free leaf via the two-step form (deps=$(go list -deps ...) && ! ... grep internal/config) exits 0 — go list succeeds independently, so it is a true green, not the single-negation false-green trap. V6: doc-sync grep of HEAD confirms interfaces.md is in the commit. V7: go build ./... exits 0. git status stayed clean throughout; no artifacts leaked (build/test write to cache). Named tests exist and pass exactly as claimed.
findings: V1 go test ./internal/panel -v -run 'TestCreate_WritesRegistrationAtomically$' | grep -q '--- PASS: ...' => exit 0
V2 go test ./internal/panel -v -run 'TestCreate_BRIEFMarkerEdgeCases$' | grep -q '--- PASS: ...' => exit 0
V3 go test ./internal/panel -v -run 'TestPanelSchemaDoc_MatchesConstants$' | grep -q '--- PASS: ...' => exit 0
V4 go test ./internal/panel => ok; forced fresh -count=1 -v => ok 0.312s, 0 FAIL lines; all three Bead-1 tests top-level PASS, edge-case subtests all PASS
V5 deps=$(go list -deps ./internal/panel) && ! printf '%s\n' "$deps" | grep -q internal/config => exit 0 (two-step form; go list step succeeds, so genuine config-free-leaf green)
V6 git show --name-only HEAD | /usr/bin/grep -qxF '.mindspec/domains/workflow/interfaces.md' => exit 0 (doc-sync present)
git status --porcelain => 0 lines before and after all runs; HEAD unchanged at 17a2ed28406990b05b82a20b3684fe0a06123246; no build artifacts in tree
